name: Goda Masala
description: Our signature Goda Masala is a traditional Maharashtrian blend of hand-picked spices, slow-roasted to perfection for that authentic sweet and savory aroma.

specifications.Key Ingredients: Coriander seeds, cumin, sesame, stone flower, cinnamon, clove

galleryImages.alt: Goda Masala in a warm heritage product setting

name: Kanda Lasun Masala
description: A bold onion-garlic masala with fiery Maharashtrian character for rich curries and non-veg dishes.

specifications.Key Ingredients: Dry onion, garlic, red chili, coriander, cumin
specifications.Best With: Tambda rassa, sukka mutton, egg curry

name: Chaat Masala

name: Coriander Seeds
description: A fragrant, sweet, and citrusy spice powder ground from premium coriander seeds, acting as the essential flavour backbone for Indian curries, dals, and dry vegetable stir-fries.

specifications.Use: Essential base note for gravies, curries, and lentil tadkas

useCases.title: Base Gravies
useCases.caption: Lends a sweet, thick texture and citrusy depth to curry bases.

useCases.title: Dal Tadka
useCases.caption: Pairs beautifully with cumin and mustard seeds in tempering.

reviews.text: The aroma is so fresh compared to standard packaged spices! Highly recommend.
